summary: Iteration 6 - End-to-end testing of the new 'KI Trader' (AI trader) strategy: parameterless strategy registration, /api/ai/* endpoints (status, config, analyze-seed, chat SSE stream, chat history, news, delete auth), regression on 5 legacy GETs + /api/auth/login, and a full frontend flow (strategy tab -> admin login modal -> AI panel -> setup expand -> chat message with streamed reply). Backend: 15/15 pytest green. Frontend: all 15 verified assertions pass (labels, panel testids, decisions chips=13, prior analysis card, user+assistant message rendered, streaming reply 554 chars German). LLM was called exactly ONCE (single chat message) as instructed; /api/ai/analyze was NOT re-triggered (existing seeded decisions were reused). AI 'enabled' left as False after tests.

design_issues.screen: AI Setup panel selects (ai-model-select / ai-interval-select / ai-confidence-select / ai-cooldown-select)
issues: React hydration warning in console: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' - same class of warning previously reported in iteration_4/5 for bt-days / opt-days selects. Now reproduced also for the AI setup <select> options. Dev-only warning, no functional impact, but the same fix pattern (remove data-ve-dynamic wrapper span from inside <option>) should be applied for consistency.

action_items: Optional cleanup: strip the <span data-ve-dynamic> wrapper from <option> children (also in AITradingPanel selects) to silence the recurring React hydration warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 2788-2804 (POST /api/ai/chat): the SSE endpoint uses require_admin as a Depends() on the JSON body handler. Because credentials must be supplied via header (Bearer token), the frontend cannot use EventSource (which cannot send Authorization headers) - it must use fetch+ReadableStream. Confirmed the FE implementation matches. Not a bug, but document this constraint in the code, otherwise future refactors to EventSource will silently 401.

server.py line 2794-2800 (chat SSE gen()): exceptions raised inside chat_stream are wrapped as `data: {"error": ...}` but the HTTP response was already committed with status 200. Consider still logging the exception server-side (logger.exception) so operators can see LLM failures - currently a silent user-visible 'error' event only.

services/ai_engine.py update_config: current test showed min_confidence persists correctly after restart-less re-read; make sure the same persistence path is exercised on backend restart (config document in Mongo, not only in-memory). Was not deeply verified this iteration, worth a dedicated regression test.

AITradingPanel.js line 148 & 174: user/assistant messages are keyed by m.id. During streaming the assistant message is progressively updated - verify keys don't collide with newly seeded 'analysis' role messages (roles enum: user | assistant | analysis). No collision observed but worth an explicit unit-check.

server.py /api/ai/news line 2813-2815: no caching header + hits multiple RSS feeds synchronously per request. Under FE polling (if introduced) this could throttle the external feeds. Add a short (30-60s) in-memory cache in news_feed.get_headlines().
seed_data_creation: None new. Reused existing seeded chat history + analysis decisions (13 coins, BTCUSDT HOLD ~78%) that were created by the main agent before this test run. min_confidence was toggled 65<->70 during test_config_update_and_persist - final value left at 70; enabled=False (as instructed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: External URL: https://neural-daytrader.preview.emergentagent.com. Admin: Admin/admin. AI endpoints all under /api/ai/*. /api/ai/analyze is EXPENSIVE (~30-90s + LLM credits) - the pytest deliberately skips triggering it and instead asserts against seeded decisions from /api/ai/status.decisions. /api/ai/chat is SSE (text/event-stream) with lines 'data: {t: <token>}\n\n' terminated by 'data: {done: true}'; the FE uses fetch+ReadableStream because EventSource cannot send Authorization header. Frontend flow: click [data-testid=strategy-tab-ai_trader] -> click [data-testid=edit-strategy-params-btn] which triggers admin login modal (if not authed) OR directly opens [data-testid=ai-trading-panel]. After admin login, gear opens AI panel. Setup collapse/expand via [data-testid=ai-setup-toggle]; 5 controls: ai-model-select/ai-interval-select/ai-confidence-select/ai-cooldown-select/ai-news-toggle. Decisions strip [data-testid=ai-decisions-strip] contains 13 chips after an analysis. Analysis message rendered as [data-testid=ai-analysis-message]. Chat: [data-testid=ai-chat-input] + [data-testid=ai-chat-send-btn]; user msg testid=ai-chat-user-message, assistant msg testid=ai-chat-assistant-message. AI 'enabled' state left as False. Recurring hydration warning: <span data-ve-dynamic> inside <option> - now also present in AITradingPanel selects, same fix as iteration_4/5.
rca of the issue: No open bugs. All 8 review-request items verified end-to-end. Notable evidence: (1) /api/strategies contains ai_trader with is_ai=true, no params, listed in enabled. (2) /api/ai/status returns all 7 config keys + has_key=true + decisions dict with 13 coins. (3) /api/ai/config returns 401 without token, updates + persists with token (min_confidence 65->70 verified via re-GET). (4) 13 seeded decisions present with action/confidence/reasoning per coin (BTCUSDT HOLD 78%). (5) chat history contains messages with role='analysis' + role='user'. (6) POST /api/ai/chat SSE streamed 554 chars German reply, terminated by done event. (7) /api/ai/news headlines returned non-empty RSS list. (8) DELETE /api/ai/chat returns 401 without token. (9) All 5 regression GETs + auth/login return 200. (10) FE: KI Trader tab visible, SignalPanel shows KI-Analyse/KI-Richtung/Konfidenz/News labels, gear -> admin login modal -> gear again -> AI panel opens with all 6 core testids + 5 setup testids + 13 decision chips + previous analysis card + streamed assistant reply on the sent chat message.
